context: Tests whether the agent correctly records an architectural decision and immediately resolves it with the chosen option and rationale using the decisions workflow.

checklist.name: decision_create called on correct page
checklist.description: Agent called decision_create with the page set to 'analysis/api-architecture' (the context-richest page)

checklist.name: Both options recorded
checklist.description: The decision_create call included both 'Redis (remote cache)' and 'In-process LRU cache' as options

checklist.name: decision_resolve called immediately
checklist.description: Agent called decision_resolve without waiting, since the outcome is already known

checklist.name: Rationale included
checklist.description: The decision_resolve call included the rationale (multiple replicas / Kubernetes / cache-miss storms)
